subject: All files deselected??
body:
Hi Guys,

I have a strange problem with some files. I've got a variety of Tif files 
that wont process. When I set-up WARP, the software goes through it's 
initial set-up and the turns everything grey and into 'deselected'. Is 
there an intrisic problem here? Is there a way to reselect them? Anyone got 
any experience of this?


Rich
